case_title: MARIAN E. JONES VS. LULA LAWRENCE et al

docket_entries.description: ACKNOWLEDGMENT OF SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT, FULLY SATISFIED, AS TO DEFENDANT LAWRENCE, LULA BURKS, STEVEN
SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF JUN-02-2009 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF JUN-02-2009 BY JUDGE PRO TEM: BRAD KAPLAN. APPEARANCES BY BOTH PARTIES. EXHIBITS RETAINED. CLERK: S. VANTREE. NOT REPORTED. (506)
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JUN-02-2009 - JUDGMENT. (CLERK-BETH WILBER, ROOM 103)
EXHIBITS FROM EXHIBIT REPORT DATED SEP-01-2009 ORDERED DESTROYED
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $2,000.00 FILED BY JONES, MARIAN E. AS TO DEFENDANT LAWRENCE, LULA BURKS, STEVEN ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JUN-02-2009 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT 506
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF (SERVICE FEE $25.00) SERVED MAY-11-2009, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON AS TO DEFENDANT LAWRENCE, LULA

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF JONES, MARIAN E. RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT LAWRENCE, LULA BURKS, STEVEN $1,000.00 PRINCIPAL, $180.00 INTEREST, $50.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $1,230.00, *THE COURT FINDS THAT DEFENDANTS DID NOT ACT IN BAD FAITH IN RETAINING THE SECURITY DEPOSIT, BUT DID FAIL TO COMPLY WITH CIVIL CODE 1950.5'S NOTIFICATION REQUIREMENTS AND IS THEREFORE NOT PERMITTED TO DEDUCT REPAIRS FROM THE DEPOSIT. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS PLAINTIFF'S AND DEFENDANT'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED
